calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May-30-2025 is admitted to probate. Hung Kin Harry Yee is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-09-2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Continued To Feb-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
